_meta.description: 领域对象文法(三层架构的文法层,2026-07-08 P2)。产品 CLI 的对象定义/引用形态、算法分类、动词/语义词表——原理层检测器(grade_extract 5 检测器/observe_ops 算子代数)吃本文件产事实。文法随产品手册版本演进:更新=编辑本文件,不改代码。新增 dangling-reference 类闭合检查=在 reference_closures 加条目(零代码);锚定链拓扑变化(非 bind→member→resolve 两跳)才需要动检测器。每条带 provenance。
_meta.closed_on: 产品手册/CLI 语法版本

service_ip_define.provenance: 形态取证自 mirror 金标准卷(knowledge/framework/mirror/smoke_test/sdns/**)与先例卷;语义=定义 service 对象并绑定 IP

pool_service_member.provenance: 同上;语义=把 service 挂为 pool 成员(pool→成员IP 映射由本条+service_ip_define 两跳确定文法拼出,是配置静态事实非猜测)

roles.name: 被绑定到 host 的 pool 名

host_pool_bind.provenance: 同上;语义=pool 接入 host 解析链(锚定检测的『接入事件』,行号语义在检测器)

host_name_define.provenance: 手册:域名状态(可用性门控)仅对本地域名存在,远端域名恒可用;A/AAAA re-query 需成员域名为本地域名才解析出 IP(2026-07-08 设备实证)

cname_member_ref.provenance: 形态取证自先例卷;语义=引用一个域名作为 cname 池成员(引用,不定义)

roles.name: cname 池成员域名(一行式变体)

cname_member_ref_inline.provenance: 先例卷观测到 `sdns pool cname <池名> <域名>` 一行式;第二参含点才当成员域名(池名惯例无点),首参为 name/member/method 子命令词的不是此形态(lookahead 排除,等价迁移自原 guard 代码)

roles.name: 负载均衡算法 token(与 algorithm_classes 分类表对照)

method_algorithm_line.provenance: 形态取证自 mirror 金标准卷 method 配置行(`… method <对象> <算法>`);_detect_lb_methods 用它抽当前生效算法

reference_closures.provenance: 2026-07-08 设备实证(A/B 定向实验仲裁,035570 上机 PASS/ANSWER:0)+手册『CNAME和MX类型的pool支持根据域名状态选择cname或mx』:成员未配本地域名→GA 视其恒可用/解析链在成员处断头;设备对该形态静默接受零报错,只有离线引用图能查到

anchoring_chains.provenance: 对应 EXCEL_FUNCTIONS.md『命中归属锚点』①层:中途新增接入解析链的 pool,其成员 IP 集合应被 check_point 引用锚定(是否要紧由 grade 结合意图判,不单独下终判)

mutating.provenance: 论文 §3.2 算子代数:瞬时态动词操作运行时状态/连接表、不改静态配置;case 含此类命令时意图通常要测其运行时行为效果(应有 V 段断言覆盖)

observe_leading.provenance: 命令开头的算子词(动词),剥掉后剩命令『对象』;object_tokens 分词用

behavior_probes.provenance: 客户端请求/解析类观测=业务行为观测(V 性质,论文 §3.2)

config_query_probes.provenance: 配置/状态查询动词:不带 runtime_state_words 时=配置存在性查询(G 性质)

runtime_state_words.provenance: show+这些词=运行时状态/统计观测(V 性质);纯 show 配置=配置存在性查询(G 性质)。刻意不含 list/get:\blist\b 会经连字符词边界误匹配 access-list/get-config 这类配置命令(对抗 review LOW 修复)

distribution.provenance: 手册:均摊/加权轮询=分布类(发 N 次→各后端累计命中∈统计区间,守恒 Σ==N);ga/hi/topology/rtt 等=确定性映射(命中由优先级/探测/哈希定,固定落点合法)——分布上下文才判写死落点/固定计数可疑,防误杀确定性映射(GA-CUT 回归教训)

dns_record_types.provenance: DNS 协议记录类型闭集(RFC 1035/3596 等)。意图↔卷面记录类型覆盖比对用(原理②秩亏的意图侧):意图文本提及的类型若在卷面 dig 观测中零出现=覆盖缺口嫌疑(2026-07-09 selfheal2 035644 实证:worker 在 frozen override 压力下删掉会 fail 的 AAAA 断言,意图『请求A或AAAA』的 AAAA 半边被静默砍掉,假 PASS 交付+毒先例写回)

count_field_words.provenance: 计数断言锚定的统计字段词(中英混合来自实际卷面观测)

rejection_semantics.provenance: 预期拒绝/不支持语义词表(draft 写的人类预期措辞,spec_conflict 探针专用)。刻意不复用 device_errors.has_cli_error(面向真实设备统一裁决句,对人写措辞几乎全失配,589432 教训);刻意不含『不存在/not found』——那是合法的删除验证预期,非预期冲突

persistence_channels._provenance: 2026-07-10 手册取证定形(CLI 10.5 Ch6/Ch20/Ch26 + Multi_Segment_Spec + HA Training):Λ(per-case 清场)只清运行配置;以下通道的产物在 Λ 外存活。字段:patterns=识别正则(卷面 G 列扫,行级);scope=污染作用域;mitigation=缓解动作(merge 排序/床态体检/共存检查)。新通道=加条目零代码(自愈合纪律)。

local_disk.provenance: CLI Ch20:『clear sdns all 不会清除SDNS配置文件』;保存快照/文件在本机磁盘跨案存活(yzg 保存族三案整卷互扰实测) 2026-07-13:并入 tau_coverage._PERSIST_RE 的 segment 变体(tau 持久面分流与本通道同读单一源)。

peer_node.provenance: CLI Ch26:synconfig to 把本地运行配置写为对端当前配置且自动写对端硬盘(from 方向才需手动 write memory);Ch6:ha synconfig runtime 双端开启后黑名单外一切配置实时复制对端;Ch5:cluster virtual priority 带 synconfig_peer_name 参数时直接配置对端

segment_fs.provenance: Multi_Segment_Spec:每分区独立 <seg>.conf;删除分区不删文件改名 .conf.tmp;同名重建+加载时 .tmp 复活转正;仅 array 下 write memory 清 .tmp;官方 spec 自带【存在问题】节

ha_sync_state_x_config_reload.provenance: CLI Ch6 官方警告:HA 开启环境下执行 synconfig from/to/rollback/config memory/config file 前必须确认启动时配置同步为禁用,否则可能配置异常

bed_probes._provenance: 床态体检门(DESIGN §3 bed_gate)的只读探针清单——探什么/怎么读全为数据,引擎零硬编码。全部命令带手册出处;探针只读(show 族),清理动作另经床账权属判定。

build.provenance: CLI 通用;yzg 双回合实证:设备自述是唯一真 build(提交值会失真)

segments.provenance: CLI Ch10/Multi_Segment_Spec rev1.2;探通道③残留分区

sdns_config_files.provenance: CLI Ch20;探通道①残留 SDNS 配置文件(clear sdns all 官方明文不清它们);空列表仍打印段落头+列头(2026-07-10 实录假阳性),header_patterns 过滤

sync_peers.provenance: CLI Ch26;探通道②同步节点配置态

sdns_config_files.provenance: CLI Ch20『清除本地所有SDNS配置文件』——粗粒度:仅当床账证明全部为己方产物才可自动执行,否则 ask(INV-9);2026-07-10 用户裁决「开工必净」:bed_gate 初始化清理自动执行本引用并复检(残留是 R1 12/26 崩盘主嫌);实测该命令要求交互输入 YES 确认——单发通道做不完,需会话式通道支持(立项)

cleanup_refs._provenance: 清理引用:bed_gate 初始化清理按 finding.kind 对号执行(2026-07-10 用户裁决:开工必净);无引用的 kind 不动手走 ask。新清理动作=加条目零代码。

interface_addresses.provenance: CLI Ch3 ip address;平台状态面(THEORY 2.7.7 R4-G2):接口地址表,床态快照 diff 投影——2026-07-11 run9 vlan100 跨批污染实证;snapshot_only:合法地址恒在,非空≠残留,只进快照 diff 不进残留判定

bed_l23_write_forms._provenance: 2026-07-12 V8.5 片3(redline 建议③):L2/L3 系统对象写=复位差集 (32) 内分量——框架 per-case 清理(clear slb/sdns 功能域)不含 interface/vlan/route(CLI Ch2/Ch3 系统配置章;233 vlan 迁移灭 9 案实证)。用途:diagnose 批级 s₀ 配对(交换子 I6 近似)。新形态=加 pattern 零代码。

occupancy_semantics._provenance: 2026-07-12 V8.5 片3(redline 建议④,防 marker 表回潮:词带边界+否定排除,数据带出处非 .py 关键字表):设备「资源已被占用/已存在」类回显语义——write memory/file 快照把功能域残留冻结、config 恢复复活后典型报错形态(run11 668030 实证:'IP/port pair may already be occupied by an SLB virtual service';RTNETLINK 'File exists' 同族)。用途:diagnose 自扰判定(本案持久写+占用回显=s₀)。|2026-07-14 出处更正(run20 窗口失真彻查):'This IP/port pair may already be occupied by an SLB virtual service. Please check and confirm' 是 sdns listener 配置时的**例行 advisory**(用户 172.16.6.86 干净床实测:警告出现且 listener 配置成功;79 床 show slb virtual all 为空亦证无占用者),非占用陈述——本条目 2026-07-12 的种子例证正是这句 advisory,系当时窗口失真下的误读。负向排除该形态后,echo_confirmed 只认真实占用陈述(already exists/in use/RTNETLINK File exists 等)。

inverse_forms._provenance: machine-derived from command_inventory_10.5 (build_inverse_forms.py; 3 axioms: no=negation, clear=aggregate reset, show=observe — CLI meta-semantics, closed over manual version). Each pair carries the manual line anchor of its construct head. Regenerate after inventory rebuild. Derivation validated on run13 (yzg 26 sheets: all L2/L3 actors covered; 62% of 1383 config heads derivable).

framework_cleanup_scopes._provenance: F2 (framework per-case cleanup scope) — the remote framework issues `clear sdns all` / `clear slb all` between cases (mirror smoke_test conftest + run13 per-case logs, e.g. 2026-07-13 02:45:35-36 lines 'clear slb all'/'clear sdns all' after every end-case). Writes whose head starts with these scopes are cleaned by the framework — they do NOT need in-case teardown. τ responsibility set = construct writes − this scope − in-case inverses ((32) reset-difference grounding; validated on run13: without F2 the derived τ check false-flags 25/26 sheets, with F2 it converges to observed behavior). Guarded by the mirror sync anchor (§18.3): if the framework cleanup changes, the anchor mismatches first.

exec_failure_markers._provenance: (43) ok(g) predicate grounding — execution-failure echo forms, machine-scanned by digest. run13 668030 live evidence: 'Failed to get the file from tftp server' + 'Failed to execute the command' after `config all tftp` — the restore silently failed and the subsequent not_found assertion passed vacuously (formula (44) violation; the case's target behavior was never actually verified across ALL rounds). RTNETLINK forms: framework IP restore contract violations (run history, e.g. cross-case duplicate ip add). Effect: markers in a PASSING case's log demote its verdict to broken (vacuous-pass suspicion, needs rerun/review); in FAILING cases they are extracted as anomaly_lines so attribution sees independent co-faults (audit pit #24: raw evidence must have equal standing with structured diagnosis). New marker form = add a pattern here, zero code.
patterns: Failed to get the file from

destructive_commands._provenance: Device-killing commands — banned from case sheets unconditionally (structural_gate._check_no_destructive_commands). Live evidence 2026-07-13: `clear config all` appeared in 668030's sheet (generated as a 'leak cleanup' step after write/config all); the batches that ran it killed BOTH beds (93 after run14, 105 after run16) — management + data ports down, peer APV_1 on the same bed unaffected, 93 still dead 2h later. It wipes the entire running config including the management IP, so the bed cannot even be probed afterwards. A test case never has a legitimate reason to wipe the whole device: object-scoped `clear <object>` or the paired `no` form is always the correct teardown. New destructive form = add a pattern here, zero code. 2026-07-13 双源合流:并入原 emit_xlsx_tool._DESTRUCTIVE_RE 的 shutdown/halt/poweroff(emit 自毁门与 structural_gate 同读此单一源,不再各写一份)。 2026-07-13 锚形态:生命周期动词(reboot/reload/shutdown/halt/poweroff)用词边界(匹配 `system reboot` 等带命名空间前缀的形态,顺带修 structural_gate 原 `^reboot` 漏检 system reboot);配置清除(clear config all/restore factory)保持行首锚。
